mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inbound(inbound_no, type, material_id, warehouse_id, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, supplier, operator_id, remark, status) VALUES(#{inboundNo}, #{type}, #{materialId}, #{warehouseId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalAmount}, #{supplier}, #{operatorId}, #{remark}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inbound ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM inbound WHERE type=#{type} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM inbound WHERE material_id=#{materialId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM inbound WHERE warehouse_id=#{warehouseId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM inbound WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM inbound WHERE operator_id=#{operatorId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
